sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n10272" key="a)ntipara/klhsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀντιπαρά-κλησις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n10272.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">mutual exhortation,</tr_> Plb <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0032.tlg007.perseus-grc1:11:12:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11.12.2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
